_source: Hand-curated vehicle modification entries missing from cyber.dat/vehicles.dat. Pages were verified against Rigger 3 Revised (Vehicle Customization chapter, p.122-155) and other SR3 sourcebooks — modifications that couldn't be located have been removed rather than fabricated.
_notes: Entries here exist because the data's vehicles.Notes column references them as standard accessories on factory vehicles, but the sr3data parser hasn't ingested them as type_id='23' modification rows.

Cost / CF / Load / Availability values are now populated where R3 lists fixed or parametric costs. The cost_formula field uses a simple expression language: body, vehicle_cost, level, pilot as variables; *, /, +, - operators; parentheses allowed.

Some items the data references in vehicle Notes (Pickup, Methane, Side Door, Living Amenities, VTOL, etc.) are vehicle descriptors or design-time options, not separately-installable modifications, so they're intentionally NOT added here — the parser routes them to unresolved/notes.
category_tree MUST start with 'Vehicle Gear' because ReadVehicleModsQuery filters for it. Weapon mounts under 'Turrets and Mounts' are additionally recognized by IsWeaponMountRow.
Entries without cost or cost_formula are design-only options (robot programming, some accessories) or require gamemaster discretion (Crane load rating, Medical Clinic rating).

modifications.name: Nitrous Oxide Injectors [6]
modifications.category_tree: Vehicle Gear > Engine Modifications > Nitrous Oxide Injectors
modifications.notes: Source data references level 6 on Ferrari Open-Wheel Racer (r3.167); R3 tables officially list [1]-[5]. Cost follows the [4]-[5] rate of 7,000¥ per level (7,000 × 6 = 42,000¥).

modifications.name: Drive-by-Wire [1]
modifications.base_time_skill_test: Body x 160 hrs/Vehicle B/R, Computer (4), Electronics (4)

modifications.notes: Referenced as standard on Mesametric Kodiak (r3.163). Cost varies by vehicle type (cars 0.35, bikes 0.2, heavy transports 0.5 per point).

modifications.notes: Alias used in source data for EnviroSeal (Water and Engine).

modifications.name: Smart Armor Systems
modifications.category_tree: Vehicle Gear > Defensive Modifications > Vehicle Armor > Smart Armor System
modifications.base_time_skill_test: Body x 40 hrs/Demolitions B/R (4), Electronics (4), Computer (4)

modifications.name: Radar Absorbent Materials [1]
modifications.notes: Often abbreviated RAM in vehicle Notes. Use military-grade Street Index.

modifications.name: Improved Signature [1]
modifications.notes: Active thermal masking (R3 p.134). Requires Engine Customization [1]. Often abbreviated 'Improved Sig' in vehicle Notes.

modifications.name: Improved Signature [2]
modifications.notes: Active thermal masking (R3 p.134). Requires Engine Customization [2]. Max official rating is +2 Signature.

modifications.name: Thermal Baffles [1]
modifications.notes: Cost varies by vehicle type (ground Bodyx5k, motorcycle Bodyx6k, truck/fixed-wing Bodyx7.5k, tractor/helicopter Bodyx10k, hovercraft Bodyx3.75k, watercraft Bodyx2.5k).

modifications.name: Thermal Baffles [2]
modifications.notes: Cost varies by vehicle type. See [1] for multipliers.

modifications.name: Thermal Baffles [3]
modifications.notes: Cost varies by vehicle type. See [1] for multipliers.

modifications.name: Thermal Baffles [4]
modifications.notes: Referenced as standard on Aztech Halcon GAA (r3.179). R3 table lists [1]-[3]; added to resolve the vehicle note. Cost varies by vehicle type.

modifications.name: Smart Materials
modifications.notes: Referenced as standard on Ruhr. Frettchen, Ruhr. Keller A4, Ruhr. Leopard III, Ferrari Open-Wheel Racer. Cost from SOTA (not available in R3).

modifications.name: Ruthenium Polymer Masking
modifications.notes: Referenced as standard on Ruhr. Frettchen (sota.78). Cost from SOTA (not available in R3).

modifications.notes: No explicit parts cost in R3. Standard internal missile mounts are 5,000¥ per CF allocated; torpedo tubes are 100,000¥ per tube.
